output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here’s How to Fight Back Fast
output.meta_description: Landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights, fight illegal deductions, and send a demand letter in 60 seconds at Deposits-Back.com.
content_outline: The Silent Heist: Why Landlords Get Away With Withholding Deposits
Know Your Rights: State Deadlines & What Landlords Can Actually Deduct
3 Illegal Excuses Landlords Use to Keep Your Money
The 60-Second Solution: How a Demand Letter Forces Compliance
Next Steps If Your Landlord Still Refuses to Pay
key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14 to 45 days and provide an itemized list of any deductions.
Normal wear and tear, minor carpet wear, and routine cleaning cannot be legally deducted from your deposit.
A formal security deposit demand letter is the fastest, most affordable way to recover your money before filing in small claims court.
output.cta: Stop fighting alone. Create your state-specific security deposit demand letter at Deposits-Back.com for just $19.99. It takes 60 seconds, and there’s no signup or subscription required.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US tenants whose landlord is withholding, partially deducting, or refusing to return their security deposit and need fast, affordable help.
